name: NIA
title: LIFE OF THE PARTY

abilities.name: Beer Goggles
abilities.text: Enemy attack actions that target this model suffer a (-) to their duel if the attacking model has a friendly Poison token.

abilities.name: Hard to Kill
abilities.text: When this model suffers damage, if it has 2 or more health, it may not be reduced to below 1 health.

abilities.name: The Hangover
abilities.text: When this model activates, it may replace itself with Nia, Fractured Future and heal 2.

actions.name: Bottle Opener
actions.costs_and_restrictions: A model within 2" of this model gains a Poison token.

triggers.name: Moonshine Mash
triggers.text: Remove a friendly Poison token from the target. This action deals +2 damage.

actions.name: It's 5 O'clock Somewhere
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this model has a friendly Poison token, it may add any one suit to its duel total.

triggers.name: Divergent Path
triggers.text: Once per activation. This model may declare an action printed on its other title.

triggers.name: Blue Blazer
triggers.text: Enemy models within (X)2" of the target are dealt 1 damage and gain a Burning token.

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Raise a Glass
actions.effects: Move any number of enemy models within range up to 3" directly toward this model.

merge_warnings: Title mismatch: front='LIFE OF THE PARTY' back='Life of the Party'
